summary: The diff shows removal of timer/duration UI from App.tsx and removal of DurationOption type from types/game.ts. The implementation appears to address most REQ-19 acceptance criteria. The App.tsx summary explicitly states 'all timer/duration-selector UI removed' and WPM continues to function. The types/game.ts confirms DurationOption was removed. However, the App.tsx content is truncated so full verification of all AC items is limited.
